headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 dominates the window, drawing coding workflows and a guardrails backlash in equal measure.
body: Claude Fable 5 anchors the week, with Claude and function calling both holding leading positions and a wave of coverage centered on Claude Code as a coding system across Desktop, CLI, and web modes, plus a Tokyo keynote and YouTube monetization workflows. The release also drew backlash over guardrails refusing harmless prompts and questions about model fallback to downgraded versions. On the infrastructure side, the routing and tier system surfaced alongside Apple's reported shift from on-device AI to NVIDIA cloud compute. RLHF and KV cache quantization broke out on the technique side, while phase diagram, Target Distribution Design, Q-target, and router-prompt co-evolution entered as new.

cited_items.title: Master Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 (57 mins)
